title: Shri Kamakhya Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Kamakhya Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Kamakhya.
description:
॥ Doha ॥
Sumiran Kamakhya karun, sakal siddhi ki khani.
Hoi prasann sat karhu Maa, jo main kahun bakhani॥

Jai Jai Kamakhya Maharani. Daatri sab sukh siddhi Bhawani॥
Kamrup hai vaas tumharo. Jahan te man nahin tarat hai taro॥
Unche giri par karhun nivasa. Purvahu sada bhagat man aasa॥
Riddhi siddhi turtai mili jaai. Jo jan dhyan dharai manlaai॥

Jo Devi ka darshan chaahe. Hraday beech yaahi avgaahe॥
Prem sahit Pandit bulwaave. Shubh muhurt nishchit vichaarve॥
Apne Guru se aagya lekar. Yatra vidhan kare nishchay dhar॥
Pujan Gauri Ganesh karaave. Nandimukh bhi shraddh jimaave॥

Shukr ko baayen va paachhe kar. Guru aru Shukr uchit rehne par॥
Jab sab grah hoven anukula. Guru pitu maatu aadi sab hula॥
Nau Brahman bulvaay jimaave. Aashirwad jab unse paave॥
Sabahin prakar shakun shubh hoi. Yatra tabahi kare sukh hoi॥

Jo chah siddhi karan kachhu bhai. Mantra lei Devi kahan jaai॥
Aadar purvak Guru bulaave. Mantra len hit din thahraave॥
Shubh muhurt mein deeksha leve. Prasann hoi dakshina devai॥
Om ka Namah kare uchcharan. Matrika nyas kare sir dhaaran॥

Shadang nyas kare so bhai. Maa Kamaksha dhar ur laai॥
Devi mantra kare man sumiran. Sanmukh mudra kare pradarshan॥
Jisse hoi prasann Bhawani. Man chahat var deve aani॥
Jabahin bhagat deekshit hoi jaai. Daan dey ritwij kahan jaai॥

Viprabandhu bhojan karvaave. Vipra nari kanya jimvaave॥
Deen anaath daridra bulaave. Dhan ki kripanta nahin dikhaave॥
Ehi vidhi samajh kritarth hove. Guru mantra nit jap kar sove॥
Devi charan ka bane pujari. Ehi te dharam na hai koi bhaari॥

Sakal Riddhi – Siddhi mil jaave. Jo Devi ka dhyan lagaave॥
Tu hi Durga tu hi Kali. Maang mein sohe maatu ke laali॥
Vak Saraswati Vidya Gauri. Maatu ke sohain sir par mauri॥
Kshudha, Duratyaya, Nidra Trishna. Tan ka rang hai maatu ka Krishna॥

Kamdhenu Subhaga aur Sundari. Maatu anguliya mein hai mundari॥
Kaalratri Vedgarbha Dheeshwari. Kanthmal Mata ne le dhari॥
Trisha Sati ek veera akshara. Deh taji janu rahi nashwara॥
Swara Maha Shri Chandi. Maatu na jaana jo rahe pakhandi॥

Mahamari Bharati Arya. Shivji ki o rahin bharya॥
Padma, Kamala, Lakshmi, Shiva. Tej maatu tan jaise diva॥
Uma, Jayi, Brahmi bhasha. Pur hin bhagtan ki abhilasha॥
Rajaswala jab roop dikhaave. Devta sakal parvatahin jaaven॥

Roop Gauri dhari karhin nivasa. Jab lag hoi na tej prakasha॥
Ehi te siddh peeth kahlaai. Jaun chahai jan so hoi jaai॥
Jo jan yah Chalisa gaave. Sab sukh bhog Devi pad paave॥
Hohin prasann Mahesh Bhawani. Kripa karhu nij – jan aswani॥

॥ Doha ॥
Karhe Gopal sumir man, Kamakhya sukh khani.
Jag hit Maa pragatat bhayi, sake na koou khani॥

॥ Shri Gurudattatreyarpanamastu ॥
|| Shri Swami Samartharpanamastu||
